name: Physics Sandbox Starter
description: Interactive physics playground with spawnable RigidBody2D objects (balls, boxes, triangles). Draw mode to create static/dynamic bodies from mouse strokes. Gravity controls (direction, magnitude). Material properties per object (bounce, friction, density). Joint system (pin, hinge, spring). Object palette with drag-and-drop placement. Full undo/redo. Slow motion control.

projectStructure.project.godot: Project config with PhysicsWorld2D settings (default gravity adjustable)

scenes/.sandbox.tscn: Root Node2D with PhysicsDirectSpaceState2D, Camera2D (pan+zoom), ObjectSpawner, DrawTool, UI CanvasLayer, GridVisualizer (optional debug grid)
scenes/.objects/ball.tscn: RigidBody2D with CircleShape2D, Sprite2D (circle), physics material (bounce 0.7, friction 0.5)
scenes/.objects/box.tscn: RigidBody2D with RectangleShape2D, Sprite2D (square), physics material (bounce 0.3, friction 0.8)
scenes/.objects/triangle.tscn: RigidBody2D with ConvexPolygonShape2D, Sprite2D (triangle), physics material (bounce 0.5, friction 0.6)
scenes/.objects/plank.tscn: RigidBody2D with RectangleShape2D (long/thin), Sprite2D, physics material, freeze_rotation option
scenes/.joints/pin_joint.tscn: PinJoint2D node connecting two RigidBody2D objects, editable limit distance
scenes/.joints/hinge_joint.tscn: HingeJoint2D (revolute joint) for rotation around anchor point
scenes/.joints/spring_joint.tscn: SpringJoint2D with adjustable stiffness and damping for oscillation
scenes/.ui/object_palette.tscn: CanvasLayer with HBoxContainer of draggable object buttons (Ball/Box/Triangle/Plank)
scenes/.ui/property_panel.tscn: CanvasLayer PanelContainer showing selected object properties: mass, bounce, friction, custom mass override
scenes/.ui/toolbar.tscn: CanvasLayer HBoxContainer with buttons: Play/Pause, Reset (clear scene), Gravity direction selector, Time scale slider (0.1x-2.0x)

scripts/.spawn_manager.gd: Handles drag-drop spawning from object_palette. On item_selected in palette, creates ghost preview following mouse. On left_click, instantiates actual RigidBody2D at click position. Stores spawned_objects array. Methods: create_object(type, position) → RigidBody2D instance with physics properties
scripts/.draw_tool.gd: Implements freehand drawing mode. On mouse_down + draw_mode active, starts tracking points. On mouse_move, draws line preview. On mouse_up, converts stroke to CollisionShape2D. Methods: stroke_to_polygon(points) → uses Geometry2D.convex_hull() to create ConvexPolygonShape2D. Creates static body (if holding Shift) or dynamic RigidBody2D (default)
scripts/.physics_controller.gd: Manages global physics settings. Properties: gravity_vector (Vector2), gravity_magnitude (float), time_scale (0.1-2.0). Methods: set_gravity(direction, magnitude) updates PhysicsServer2D.gravity or applies custom gravity per frame via _physics_process(). set_time_scale(scale) applies Engine.time_scale. get_time_scale() returns current
scripts/.joint_creator.gd: Creates joints between selected objects. Methods: create_pin_joint(body1, body2, limit_distance) instantiates PinJoint2D. create_hinge_joint(body1, body2, anchor) creates HingeJoint2D. create_spring_joint(body1, body2, stiffness, damping) creates SpringJoint2D. UI: right-click 2 objects to open joint menu
scripts/.object_properties.gd: Attached to spawned objects. Stores: mass, bounce (restitution), friction. Attached to property_panel UI to display/edit. Methods: set_property(key, value) updates RigidBody2D.mass, PhysicsMaterial.bounce, etc. Signals: property_changed
scripts/.undo_manager.gd: Implements undo/redo system using Godot's UndoRedo. Methods: create_action(name) starts action, add_do_method(obj, method, args), add_undo_method(obj, method, args), commit_action(). Tracks spawn, delete, property_change, joint_creation. Ctrl+Z undoes, Ctrl+Y redoes
scripts/.sandbox_state.gd: Save/load sandbox setups. Methods: save_state(filename) exports scene to .tscn or JSON with all object positions/properties/joints. load_state(filename) reconstructs scene from saved state. Stores state history for quick reset

assets/.sprites/objects/: PNG sprites for ball (circle), box (square), triangle, plank (rectangle) with distinct colors
assets/.sprites/ui/: Icons for buttons (play/pause, reset, gravity arrow, object palette icons)
assets/.sprites/materials/: Optional texture overrides for object appearance (wood, metal, rubber textures)
assets/.fonts/: Default and monospace fonts for property labels

preBuiltMechanics: RigidBody2D physics with built-in gravity and collision detection
Drag-drop object spawning from UI palette (Ball, Box, Triangle, Plank)
Freehand drawing tool converting mouse strokes to convex collision shapes
Static vs. dynamic body creation (Shift+draw = static, default = dynamic)
Per-object material properties: mass, bounce (restitution), friction
Global gravity controls: direction (8-way or slider) and magnitude adjustment
Joint system: PinJoint2D (distance constraint), HingeJoint2D (rotation), SpringJoint2D (oscillation)
Time scale slider for slow-motion physics analysis (0.1x to 2.0x)
Full undo/redo system (Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Y) for all actions
Scene save/load for preserving sandbox setups
customizationPoints: Add force application tools: push/pull gravity wells, wind zones, vortex
Implement constraint system: ropes, chains, rigid beams with breaking points
Create breakable objects that fragment into smaller pieces on impact
Add visual debugging: velocity vectors, collision normals, center of mass indicators
Implement particle systems: explosions, smoke clouds, dust trails
Create preset scenes: pendulum, chain reaction, catapult, Newton's cradle
Add motor joints with adjustable rotation speed
Implement ragdoll system with articulated skeleton joints
Create soft-body simulation using distance constraints
Add network multiplayer with physics state synchronization
examplePrompts: Add a gravity well that pulls nearby objects toward cursor position
Create a wind force slider that applies constant horizontal force to objects
Implement rope constraints using multiple pin joints in series
Add breakable objects that split into fragments on high-impact collisions
Create a catapult builder with rotating arm (hinge joint) and release mechanism
Implement particle effects: debris/smoke on collisions, trails following fast objects
Add a rope cutting tool to sever joints with mouse drag
Create preset scenes: pendulum, dominoes, lever, pulley system
Implement soft-body physics using distance constraints instead of rigid shapes
Add explosion force that pushes nearby objects away from center
